# remediation module constants
AUTO_FIX_CONFIDENCE = 0.9
DUPLICATE_PROPOSABLE_CONFIDENCE = 0.6
DUPLICATE_PROPOSABLE_SIMILARITY = 0.75
HOOK_SCRIPT_CONTENT = 'script_content'
HOOK_SCRIPT_PATH = 'script_path'
HOOK_SETTINGS_DIFF = 'settings_diff'
HOOK_TOTAL_COUNT = 'total_count'
INSTRUCTION_VIOLATION_CANDIDATE = 'instruction_violation_candidate'
IVC_CONFIDENCE = 'confidence'
IVC_CORRECTION_MESSAGE = 'correction_message'
IVC_INSTRUCTION_TEXT = 'instruction_text'
IVC_MATCH_TYPE = 'match_type'
IVC_NEEDS_REVIEW = 'needs_review'
IVC_REASON = 'reason'
IVC_SKILL_NAME = 'skill_name'
MAJOR_EXCESS_RATIO = 1.6
MEC_CONFIDENCE = 'confidence'
MEC_PROPOSED_EFFORT = 'proposed_effort'
MEC_REASON = 'reason'
MEC_SKILL_NAME = 'skill_name'
MEC_SKILL_PATH = 'skill_path'
MISSING_EFFORT_CANDIDATE = 'missing_effort_candidate'
PROPOSABLE_CONFIDENCE = 0.5
RULE_ALTERNATIVE_TOOLS = 'alternative_tools'
RULE_CONTENT = 'content'
RULE_FILENAME = 'filename'
RULE_TARGET_COMMANDS = 'target_commands'
RULE_TOTAL_COUNT = 'total_count'
SE_SCORES = 'scores'
SE_SKILL_DIR = 'skill_dir'
SE_SKILL_NAME = 'skill_name'
SE_SUITABILITY = 'suitability'
SE_TOTAL_SCORE = 'total_score'
SKILL_EVOLVE_CANDIDATE = 'skill_evolve_candidate'
SKILL_QUALITY_PATTERN_GAP = 'skill_quality_pattern_gap'
SQP_DOMAIN = 'domain'
SQP_MISSING_RECOMMENDED = 'missing_recommended'
SQP_MISSING_REQUIRED = 'missing_required'
SQP_OVERALL_SCORE = 'overall_score'
SQP_PATTERN_SCORE = 'pattern_score'
SQP_SKILL_NAME = 'skill_name'
SQP_SKILL_PATH = 'skill_path'
TOOL_USAGE_HOOK_CANDIDATE = 'tool_usage_hook_candidate'
TOOL_USAGE_RULE_CANDIDATE = 'tool_usage_rule_candidate'
VERIFICATION_RULE_CANDIDATE = 'verification_rule_candidate'
VRC_CATALOG_ID = 'catalog_id'
VRC_DESCRIPTION = 'description'
VRC_DETECTION_CONFIDENCE = 'detection_confidence'
VRC_EVIDENCE = 'evidence'
VRC_RULE_FILENAME = 'rule_filename'
VRC_RULE_TEMPLATE = 'rule_template'
WCC_CATEGORY = 'category'
WCC_CONFIDENCE = 'confidence'
WCC_DESCRIPTION = 'description'
WCC_EVIDENCE_COUNT = 'evidence_count'
WCC_SKILL_NAME = 'skill_name'
WCC_TEMPLATE = 'template'
WORKFLOW_CHECKPOINT_CANDIDATE = 'workflow_checkpoint_candidate'

# remediation public function / class signatures
check_regression(fixed_file: str, original_content: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
classify_issue(issue: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]
classify_issues(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> Dict[str, List[Dict[str, Any]]]
compute_confidence_score(issue: Dict[str, Any]) -> float
compute_impact_scope(file_path: str) -> str
fix_claudemd_missing_section(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_claudemd_phantom_refs(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_global_rule(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_hook_scaffold(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_instruction_violation(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_line_limit_violation(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_missing_effort(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_pitfall_archive(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_preflight_scriptification(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_skill_evolve(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_skill_quality_pattern_gap(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_split_candidate(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_stale_memory(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_stale_references(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_stale_rules(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_untagged_reference(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_verification_rule(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
fix_workflow_checkpoint(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
generate_proposals(issues: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
generate_rationale(issue: Dict[str, Any], category: str) -> str
record_outcome(issue: Dict[str, Any], category: str, action: str, result: str, user_decision: str, rationale: str, *, dry_run: bool = False, fix_detail: Dict[str, Any] | None = None, verify_result: Dict[str, Any] | None = None, duration_ms: int | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any] | None
rollback_fix(fixed_file: str, original_content: str) -> bool
verify_fix(fixed_file: str, original_issue: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]
